title: Pendulum Lab: a validated chaotic-pendulum research laboratory
description: A framework-free, zero-runtime-dependency TypeScript engine and browser laboratory for nonlinear pendulum dynamics: twelve order-certified integrators, full Lyapunov spectra with uncertainty estimates, covariant Lyapunov vectors, 0-1 test, RQA, FTLE fields, basin entropy, Floquet analysis with continuation and branch switching, and a Melnikov analytic chaos threshold. Validated against an independent SciPy DOP853 reference (double and triple pendulum), a double-double extended-precision reference, and published literature anchors. Runs fully in the browser with a headless CLI for batch studies.
